title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: mdadm bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for mdadm is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The mdadm packages contain a utility for creating, managing, and monitoring Linux multiple disk (MD) devices.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [rhel9.6.z] mdadm: array name with ":" can't be assemble when specifying --name (JIRA:RHEL-109231)

full_text:
An update for mdadm is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The mdadm packages contain a utility for creating, managing, and monitoring Linux multiple disk (MD) devices.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [rhel9.6.z] mdadm: array name with ":" can't be assemble when specifying --name (JIRA:RHEL-109231)
